content.headline: Bethpage Black: A Championship Test in Your Glass
content.description_html:
Bethpage Black is no casual round. At 7,230 yards with a slope of 148, this New York classic demands respect—and rewards it. Hosting major championships and known for its relentless challenge, Black is the kind of course that separates the confident from the cautious. Now you can bring that intensity home.

Split the Tee's Bethpage Black glass covers 9 holes of pure drama. Watch your beer level climb as you track scores across the course's toughest stretches. The etched ruler markings become your scorecard; the glass itself becomes the leaderboard. Finish a hole under par? Your drink stays lower. Struggle through a bogey run? The glass fills faster. It's golf scoring made visible, tactile, and social—every sip is a moment from the course.

This is the glass you pass around with your crew. Each player gets their own, tracking their own line through Bethpage's gauntlet. Over nine holes and multiple drinks, you're not just remembering the course—you're living it together. One glass, one round, one unforgettable night.
bullets: 7,230 yards of championship-level challenge—slope 148 demands every shot count
Track your Bethpage scorecard in real time as the beer level rises and falls
Nine holes, multiple drinks, one glass per player—perfect for a crew night
The etched ruler markings turn every hole into a visual, drinkable memory
Bring the intensity of a major championship venue to your table
